desc: HS 2701 — coal and briquettes (not metallurgical-grade specific). The taxation policy review names Tanzania as the coal supplier — consistent with EAC being almost all of this trade.

HS 2521 (limestone) — the value-chain report names Karamoja as a domestic limestone source, consistent with this trade being almost entirely regional/EAC rather than a major standalone import. Dolomite specifically (HS 2518, not shown here) is tiny — USD 14k imports in 2024 — but the taxation review names India as a dolomite supplier.
HS 2713 — petroleum coke, bitumen and other petroleum-oil residues
HS 2529 — feldspar, leucite, nepheline, fluorspar (not fluorite-specific)
HS 2614 — titanium and zirconium ores and concentrates
